headline: How The Akamai Technologies (AKAM) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI And Heavier Spending
summary: Akamai Technologies now sits on an updated base case fair value of US$110.98, compared with the prior US$102.72 level used in the model. This shift lines up with recent research that combines enthusiasm around compute, security and AI inference growth with questions about how heavier investment and spending may influence the story. In the sections ahead, you will see how this evolving analyst narrative fits together and what it could mean for how you track Akamai from here. Analyst Price...
